type_definitions.name: ReviewCycle
type_definitions.description: Existing usecase orchestrator (struct-only) that drives the review → verdict → hash recording pipeline per scope. It consumes ReviewScopeConfig for file classification; this track changes the config's internal shape (ScopeEntry) but not ReviewCycle itself. Declared with action=reference to document the usecase-layer touchpoint and satisfy the Stage 2 TDDD verification requirement that tddd.enabled layers carry at least one declared type.
